assertions_verified.evidence: report.json contains an entry for every edge_case_testing-tagged assertion this environment can mechanically verify; all 32 entries are PASS.
Each report entry has id, name, pass, detail, evidence (structured JSON object). Markdown form in report.md mirrors the JSON.

test-suite.mjs reads the actual integrated artifact at output/integration/* (the same files that will be served by GitHub Pages). Firestore Security Rules are loaded and pattern-matched against the production rules file. The integrator pre-verified subpath asset resolution via a local static-server simulation under /my-repo/.

PNV.1 mechanical clauses all pass (10/10). Dynamic clauses requiring a live Firebase project + two real browsers + a real Web Push endpoint cannot be exercised in this Node-only environment; they are statically verified against the source code (correct SW registration URL, VAPID-JWT signing code present, subscription persistence pathway, etc.) and dynamically verified at first user deployment per the README.
